case_title: MIGUEL SIPION POOL SERVICES VS. LEE HNETINKA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT HNETINKA, LEE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-26-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2025 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT DENIED**
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT HNETINKA, LEE TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT MIGUEL SIPION POOL SERVICES (SEE JUDGEMENT FOR MORE INFORMATION) PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,200.00 FILED BY MIGUEL SIPION POOL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT HNETINKA, LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIGUEL SIPION POOL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HNETINKA, LEE $6,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,275.00, PLAINTIFF MET HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THE REASONABLE VALUE OF HIS SERVICES. THE COURT CONSIDERED EVIDENCE BROUGHT BY DEFENDANT RE LEAKING, BUT DID NOT FIND THEM ATTRIBUTABLE TO PLAINTIFF'S NEGLIGENCE. THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISHED THAT THE WORK WAS PERFORMED AT DEFENDANT'S REQUEST, THROUGH HIS AGENT AND THAT THE PRICES CHARGED WERE REASONABLE. DEFENDANT FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROVING SATISFACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT HNETINKA, LEE MAILED TO RESPONDENT MIGUEL SIPION POOL SERVICES
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF'S & DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED. SERVED FEB-06-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HNETINKA, LEE
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2025 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON MAR-26-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 624, JUDGE REARDON. (206)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2025 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. LEE HNETINKA DOES NOT OWE MIGUEL SIPION POOL SERVICES ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF FEB-14-2025. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE: SHARON REARDON, CLERK: K. SEPTIEN, NOT REPORTED, (624).

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Miguel Sipion Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per.
Lee Hnetika Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per.

Parties are sworn.

Miguel Sipion Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on his own behalf.

Plaintiff/Respondent introduces the following exhibits:

Exh. 1: T-Mobile Talk and Text records
Exh. 2: Printed text screenshots
Exh. 3: January 13 Email
Exh. 4: January 22 document

Plaintiff/Respondent calls witness Efrain Ramos to testify.
Efrain Ramos is sworn.

Lee Hnetika Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant introduces the following exhibits:

Exh. A: Invoice sent by Plaintiff
Exh. B: California Business Search
Exh. C: Contractors State License Search
Exh. D: California Code section 7028
Exh. E: California Code section 7031
Exh. F: California State Licensing Board Regulations
Exh. G: Judgment
Exh. H: Declaration of Dana Lim
Exh. I: Screenshot of payment
Exh. J: Proposal of Olga Davalos

At the close of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission, but notes that the license number provided on the invoice is expired.

Exhibits are retained the Court.

Judge: Sharon Reardon, Clerk: K. Septien, not reported, (624).
